_description: Claude Code Agentic WF — State machine with ReAct loop via conditional edges

inputs.purpose: Claude Code WF — Agentic coding assistant

inputs.role: You are Claude Code, an interactive CLI-based AI coding assistant. You help users with software engineering tasks by reading files, writing code, running commands, and searching codebases.
inputs.constraints: Always use tools to gather information before making changes. Prefer reading existing code before editing. Run tests after changes. Ask for permission before destructive operations.

params.value: [{"name":"FileRead","description":"Read file contents","concurrency_safe":true,"parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string"}},"required":["path"]}},{"name":"FileWrite","description":"Write content to file","concurrency_safe":false,"parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"content":{"type":"string"}},"required":["path","content"]}},{"name":"ShellExec","description":"Execute shell command","concurrency_safe":false,"parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string"},"cwd":{"type":"string"}},"required":["command"]}},{"name":"GlobSearch","description":"Find files by glob pattern","concurrency_safe":true,"parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"pattern":{"type":"string"}},"required":["pattern"]}},{"name":"GrepSearch","description":"Search file contents by regex","concurrency_safe":true,"parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"pattern":{"type":"string"},"path":{"type":"string"}},"required":["pattern"]}},{"name":"WebSearch","description":"Search the web","concurrency_safe":true,"parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string"}},"required":["query"]}},{"name":"WebFetch","description":"Fetch URL content","concurrency_safe":true,"parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"url":{"type":"string"}},"required":["url"]}},{"name":"GitCommit","description":"Commit and optionally push MCP server tool","concurrency_safe":false,"parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"server":{"type":"string"},"tool":{"type":"string"},"arguments":{"type":"object"}},"required":["server","tool"]}},{"name":"CodeExec","description":"Execute JavaScript code","concurrency_safe":false,"parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string"}},"required":["code"]}},{"name":"Notification","description":"Send notification to params.system_prompt: You are Claude Code, an AI coding assistant. You MUST use tools to complete tasks. Read files before editing. Run commands to verify changes. Use FileRead, ShellExec, GlobSearch, GrepSearch tools proactively.
